title: Living Style Guide Decision Record
description: Schema for individual reviewer-decision records appended to Design-System/showcase/decisions.json by the showcase server (Story 1.1, Epic #2429). Each record captures one accept/reject/annotate action against one (category, itemId) pair.

category.description: One of the nine canonical showcase categories.

itemId.description: Stable identifier within the category (e.g., a token name, a screen catalog entry id). Namespaced by (category, itemId) — same itemId may appear under different categories without collision.

decision.description: Reviewer action taken on the item.

note.description: Optional reviewer note. Capped at 1000 chars (Design-Decisions/2026-05-16, PRD Open Q4).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the decision was recorded.

examples.note: Contrast fails AA against the surface-2 background.
Consider tightening line-height to 1.1 on the hero variant.
